top_signals.title: We thought these 5 stocks could make a 2026 comeback. Here’s our midyear scorecard
top_signals.summary: Despite war volatility and AI concerns, the S&P 500 still managed to jump 9.5% year to date.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Targets California Again In SpaceX Feud
top_signals.summary: For years, U.S. President Donald Trump has loomed large over California's energy and environmental sectors as he tries to promote fossil fuels and roll back the state’s climate initiatives, with varying degrees of success. Back in 2019, the Trump administration effectively revoked California's federal waiver under the Clean Air Act that allowed the state to set its own stringent greenhouse gas emissions standards. The president has been even more aggressive during his second term. Last year, Trump utilized federal agencies to mandate the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
top_signals.summary: Crypto ATMs are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
